grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Response only specifies 6 months of bank statements, not 12 months

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Clearly requires full AML ID checks on both parents and their bank statements showing the £100,000

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: Explicitly requires signed gift letter confirming it is unconditional with no repayment required

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: Opens by stating must adopt a risk-based approach and discusses risk assessment throughout

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: No mention of 5-year record-keeping requirement anywhere in the response
